clause_text: The University will invoice the Client monthly. Payment is due on the 20th day of the month following the date of each invoice.

output.detected_text: Payment is due on the 20th day of the month following the date of each invoice
output.reason: Matches the preferred position: payment on the 20th of the month following the invoice date.
output.next_steps: No action required; aligns with the preferred position.

clause_text: Each party must keep the other's Confidential Information confidential for five (5) years after expiry of this Agreement. Confidential Information excludes information that is or becomes public other than through breach.

output.detected_text: keep the other's Confidential Information confidential for five (5) years after expiry
output.reason: A ~5-year duration and the standard public-information exclusion align with the preferred position.

clause_text: This Agreement is governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of England and Wales, and the parties submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the English courts.

output.detected_text: governed by ... the laws of England and Wales ... exclusive jurisdiction of the English courts
output.reason: The United Kingdom is an acceptable (not preferred NZ) jurisdiction; acceptable without escalation but flag for Contract Manager review.
output.suggested_revision: This Agreement is governed by the laws of New Zealand, and the parties submit to the non-exclusive jurisdiction of the New Zealand courts.

clause_text: The Sponsor may, by written notice, require the University to delay publication of Results for a period not exceeding twelve (12) months to allow for protection of intellectual property.

output.detected_text: delay publication of Results for a period not exceeding twelve (12) months
output.reason: A publication stand-down of up to 12 months is within the acceptable position; Contract Manager review recommended.
output.suggested_revision: The Sponsor may request a publication delay of no more than 60 days to allow for review and IP protection; any stand-down will not exceed 12 months, and students retain the right to publish for academic purposes.

clause_text: The University's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall be unlimited, and the University shall hold the Client harmless against all losses howsoever arising.

output.detected_text: aggregate liability ... shall be unlimited ... hold the Client harmless against all losses
output.reason: Uncapped liability and a 'hold harmless' obligation conflict with the capped-liability position (lesser of contract value or NZD $500,000); escalation required.
output.suggested_revision: The University's total aggregate liability under this Agreement (including under any indemnity) is limited to the lesser of the contract value or NZD $500,000, and to direct losses caused by the University's negligence or wilful misconduct; consequential and indirect losses are excluded.

clause_text: The Client may prohibit publication of any results arising from the project for a period of three (3) years from the end of the project.

output.detected_text: prohibit publication of any results ... for a period of three (3) years
output.reason: A 3-year publication embargo exceeds the 12-month acceptable limit; escalate (embargo >12 months -> School of Graduate Studies).
output.suggested_revision: Any pre-publication stand-down shall not exceed twelve (12) months; an embargo beyond 12 months requires approval by the School of Graduate Studies.

clause_text: Neither party will be liable for any failure or delay in performance to the extent caused by an event beyond its reasonable control, including acts of God, war, or pandemic.

output.detected_text: Neither party will be liable for ... an event beyond its reasonable control
output.reason: Force majeure is a recognised clause but is not addressed in the University's contracting positions matrix.
output.next_steps: No UoA position applies; note for the reviewer (no escalation required).

clause_text: Each party shall comply with all applicable anti-bribery and modern slavery laws and maintain adequate procedures to prevent such conduct.

output.detected_text: comply with all applicable anti-bribery and modern slavery laws
output.reason: Anti-bribery / modern-slavery compliance appears in the contract but falls outside the 21 documented contracting positions.
output.next_steps: Outside the UoA contracting positions; flag for reviewer awareness.
